title: zerna pumpelliana subsp. korotkiji
intro: Zerna pumpelliana subsp. korotkiji, also known as the korotkii false chamomile, is a plant species in the genus Zerna, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and calming effects. The plant contains flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to possess health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, korotkii false chamomile has been prepared as a tea or used in herbal remedies, although it is essential to note that the plant's efficacy and safety may vary depending on the individual and the specific preparation method.
